items.title: YouTube mentions are the single strongest predictor of whether AI will recommend your brand, according to a study of 75,000 companies

items.title: Here’s how Google is responding to Fitbit users who don’t like the new Health app
items.summary: After a flood of complaints about the Google Health app that just replaced Fitbit, Google has responded with a list of changes that will roll out starting this week.
